vocab.meaning: một thảm màu sắc rực rỡ và đan xen
vocab.example: Looking down at the autumn forest from the peak was like seeing a rich tapestry of colors.

vocab.meaning: đường chân trời không bị che khuất
vocab.example: The best part of being on the cruise ship was waking up to an uninterrupted horizon every morning.

vocab.meaning: những ngọn đồi nhấp nhô, trập trùng
vocab.example: The villa offered a peaceful view of the undulating hills that seemed to stretch on forever.

vocab.meaning: nằm chênh vênh trên vách đá (tạo góc nhìn đẹp)
vocab.example: The monastery, perched on a cliff, provided a dizzying but magnificent view of the valley.
The ancient ruins looked absolutely ethereal when they were partially shrouded in mist at dawn.

vocab.meaning: địa hình gồ ghề, hiểm trở (mang vẻ đẹp hoang dã)
vocab.example: I was captivated by the rugged terrain of the canyon, which looked stunning under the midday sun.

vocab.meaning: sự rộng lớn kinh khủng của (cái gì đó)
vocab.example: The sheer scale of the glacier was overwhelming when I saw it from the observation deck.

vocab.meaning: làn nước trong vắt như pha lê
vocab.example: We looked down from the bridge to see the crystalline waters of the stream rushing over the rocks.

vocab.meaning: rất gần (nhấn mạnh vị trí ngắm cảnh)
vocab.example: Our hotel was a stone's throw from the lake, so we enjoyed a premier view of the water throughout our stay.

vocab.meaning: ánh sáng huyền ảo, thanh thoát
vocab.example: The snow-capped mountains had an ethereal glow during the 'blue hour' just before sunrise.
